overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars Jedi game showing the protagonist exploring a massive futuristic cityscape at night. The character walks through neon-lit open plazas beneath enormous ring-shaped space station structures, traverses elevated walkways with panoramic city views, and transitions into indoor corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza beneath massive orbital ring structure

events.description: character stops walking to look up at the massive ring structure overhead
character resumes walking forward while looking around the plaza

agents.ego_description: standing and looking up at the massive ring structure overhead, then beginning to walk through the plaza while observing surroundings

notable_agents.action: stormtrooper standing guard near the building entrance

entered.detail: enormous circular space station structure dominating the sky with red lights along its edge and intricate mechanical details
tall illuminated skyscrapers with purple and blue lighting and industrial architecture
reflective dark metallic surface with red accent markings and geometric patterns
tall cylindrical light posts with orange glowing lanterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a vast futuristic plaza beneath a colossal ring-shaped space station structure that dominates the night sky. The character stands looking up at the impressive architecture before beginning to walk through the open area, passing a stationary stormtrooper guard. The environment features reflective paved surfaces, neon lighting, and towering futuristic buildings in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level walkway with storage containers and building facades

events.description: large storage crates temporarily block view of the plaza and ring structure
character turns right to navigate around building corner

agents.ego_description: walking along the ground level past industrial storage crates and building facades, navigating around corners and obstacles

notable_agents.action: stormtrooper walking past the character on the right side of the path

entered.detail: large industrial crates with red and yellow hazard markings stacked near the building
rounded doorway with metallic frame and red accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open plaza into a more confined ground-level area with industrial storage containers and building facades. The view of the distant tower cluster is lost as the character turns, while neon lights shift to the left side. The character passes a walking stormtrooper while navigating around building corners and storage obstacles.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge with panoramic city views

events.description: character stops walking to look up at the massive ring structure and flying traffic above
flying vehicles pass overhead in the distance between the towers

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated bridge with safety railings, pausing to look up at the massive overhead structure and observe flying traffic in the distance

entered.detail: metallic safety barrier with integrated white lighting strips
suspended circular structures with red warning lights hanging in the void between buildings
massive skyscrapers fading into the blue atmospheric haze with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character ascends to an elevated walkway with panoramic views of the futuristic cityscape. Safety railings line the path while floating platforms with red lights hang in the distance. The character pauses to look up at the massive ring structure and observe flying vehicles passing between the distant towers. The storage containers and ground-level buildings are left behind as the perspective opens to the city depth.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior corridor with metallic walls and overhead lighting

events.description: character enters indoor corridor from the outdoor elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking into an enclosed corridor with metallic architecture, artificial overhead lighting, and passing a distant stormtrooper

notable_agents.action: stormtrooper walking in the distance down the corridor

entered.detail: dark metallic wall sections with horizontal ridges and industrial detailing
long rectangular fluorescent lights providing uniform illumination
blue glowing display mounted on the wall showing geometric patterns
arched door frames leading to side rooms with dark interiors

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the outdoor walkway into an enclosed indoor corridor with dark metallic walls and overhead fluorescent lighting. A blue holographic sign is visible on the left wall as the character passes through arched doorways. The massive ring structure and city views are left behind as the environment becomes fully enclosed. A distant stormtrooper is visible walking down the corridor ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vast, neon-lit futuristic plaza into the claustrophobic confines of an indoor industrial corridor. It begins beneath a colossal ring-shaped space station that dominates the night sky, moving past a stationary stormtrooper across reflective paved surfaces. As the character navigates around building corners and industrial storage containers, the open vista narrows and the lighting shifts, before the camera ascends to an elevated walkway that restores a panoramic view of flying vehicles and distant towers. The scene then shifts from this open height into an enclosed interior, passing through arched doorways where the city lights are replaced by dark metallic walls and blue holographic signage. Finally, the environment becomes fully internalized as the camera follows the path toward a distant stormtrooper walking down the fluorescent-lit hallway.
